query:
UPDATE availability a
JOIN workers w ON a.workerId = w.id
SET a.confirmedAt = NULL
WHERE w.name LIKE '%伊娜%'
AND a.weekStartDate >= '2026-02-09'
AND a.weekStartDate < '2026-02-16';
command:
